skills.name: prd-assessment
skills.description: Three-mode PRD skill: CREATE (interview → new PRD for greenfield projects), ASSESS (existing PRD + architecture → IMPACT-ASSESSMENT.md), PIVOT (direction change → impact assessment with skills to disable, invalidated context MDs, and affected in-flight cards).
skills.author: talisik-ai
